name: offerforge
description: Claude Code-native, LaTeX-first CV + Cover-Letter builder with a hybrid learning loop and a job-application pipeline.

scripts.test: node scripts/fetch-jd.mjs --self-test && node scripts/seed-examples.mjs --self-test && node scripts/cli.mjs --self-test && node scripts/scan.mjs --self-test && node scripts/style-diff.mjs --self-test && node scripts/style-profile.mjs --self-test && node scripts/style-retrieve.mjs --self-test && node scripts/style-loop.integration-test.mjs && node scripts/analyze.mjs --self-test && node scripts/followup.mjs --self-test && node lib/_selftest.mjs
